job_description:
• Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Industrial Engineering, or a related field 5+ years of Planning experience Proficient in using MRP for supply chain and inventory planning Experience with Production Planning, Item Master Data (Bills of Material, Routing, lead time, lot size, safety stock), and Capacity Planning Effective team player with strong interpersonal and collaboration skills Sense of urgency regarding objectives and timelines, while maintaining flexibility to shifting priorities Must have the ability to prepare and deliver effective presentations.
• Strong organizational, communication and reporting skills Experience in ERP systems, Oracle Cloud preferred APICS certification desirable Director, Operations and R&D FinancePleasanton, California, USA HQFinancePosted 14 days agoSenior Buyer-Indirect (TEMP) Pleasanton, California, USA HQOperationsPosted a month agoSolutions Architect, Oracle Cloud SCMPleasanton, California, USA HQIT & Productivity EngineeringPosted 2 months agoDirector, Global Digital MarketingPleasanton, California, USA HQMarketingPosted 4 months agoHead of Commercial Excellence and OperationsPleasanton, California, USA HQSalesPosted 2 months agoStaff Data Scientist, MarketingPleasanton, California, USA HQMarketingPosted 6 months agoMarket Development Manager: Biopharma & Academia (Translational Research)Pleasanton, California, USA HQMarketingPosted 22 days agoVP, Corporate ControllerPleasanton, California, USA HQFinancePosted 2 months agoSr.
• Plan and create production orders for components and assemblies considering demand and lead times to optimize stock levels across the global network.
• Generate MRP and coordinate with Procurement to secure materials for production orders, plus manage inventory including safety stock and shelf life.
• Interface with Logistics regarding material receipt and movement, with Manufacturing concerning scheduling and capacity, and with Quality for Quality Control coordination.
• Communicate regularly with cross functional partners, such as Commercial and Finance to make inventory decisions based on trends, inventory targets, and customer order fill rates.
• Plan and coordinate balanced inventory levels by Distribution Center.
• Establish and track KPIs such as Backorder, On Time Request, WO Shortage.
